summary: Completed focused re-verification testing of FASE H6 (HR Analytics Dashboard / BI SDM) after two fixes from iteration_89. FIX-1 (default period): Backend now correctly defaults to '2026-06' (latest payroll period WITH attendance data) instead of '2026-08', dashboard shows 100% attendance and Rp 42.6M payroll on initial load. US3 (manager access): Confirmed FALSE POSITIVE from iteration_89 - manager CAN see BI SDM nav item because ANALITIK group is already expanded (manager's home 'reports/Dashboard' is inside that group). The iteration_89 test incorrectly clicked the toggle which collapsed an already-expanded group. All backend APIs (100% pass) and frontend functionality (100% pass) working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend FIX-1: Default period is '2026-06' (latest payroll WITH attendance, not '2026-08')
Backend FIX-1: Attendance rate = 100.0% on default period (dashboard has data on initial load)
Backend FIX-1: Payroll net = Rp 42,592,999 on default period (data present)
Backend US4: Sales user GET /hr/analytics/summary -> 403 (correct RBAC)
Backend US4: Manager user GET /hr/analytics/summary -> 200 (has hr.view permission)
Backend US4: Admin user GET /hr/analytics/summary?entity_id=all (no period) -> 200 with period='2026-06'
Backend US2: Period switch to 2026-07 successful (Tren Lembur shows 4.5 jam)
Backend US2: Period switch to 2026-08 successful (Attendance 0%, no attendance data, expected)
Backend US2: Period switch back to 2026-06 successful (Attendance 100%, full data returns)
Frontend FIX-1: Default period selector shows '2026-06' on initial load
Frontend FIX-1: Attendance KPI shows 100% on initial load (dashboard not empty)
Frontend FIX-1: Payroll KPI shows Rp 42.6 jt on initial load (data present)
Frontend US1: Admin can navigate to BI SDM (expand ANALITIK group -> click BI SDM)
Frontend US1: All 6 KPI cards render (headcount, attendance, punctuality, payroll, BPJS, PPh21)
Frontend US1: All charts render correctly (Headcount per Departemen, Komposisi Tipe Pekerja, Distribusi Kehadiran, Tren Biaya Gaji, Tren Lembur, Statutory & Turnover)
Frontend US2: Period switch to 2026-07 works (UI updates correctly)
Frontend US2: Period switch to 2026-08 works (Attendance shows 0%, expected)
Frontend US2: Period switch back to 2026-06 works (Attendance shows 100%, full data returns)
Frontend US3: Manager login successful, lands on reports/Dashboard view
Frontend US3: ANALITIK (BI) group is ALREADY EXPANDED for manager (confirmed)
Frontend US3: BI SDM nav item (nav-cs-bi-hrd) IS VISIBLE for manager WITHOUT clicking toggle
Frontend US3: Manager can click BI SDM nav item and access the view
Frontend US3: HR Analytics view renders for manager (hr-analytics-view present)
Frontend US3: All 6 KPI cards render for manager
Frontend US3: Manager sees default period '2026-06' (correct)
Frontend US3: Manager sees attendance rate 100% (data present)
Frontend US3: FALSE POSITIVE from iteration_89 CONFIRMED - test clicked toggle which collapsed already-expanded group

success_percentage.backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed - FIX-1 default period, US4 RBAC, US2 period switching)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (27/27 tests passed - FIX-1 default period UI, US1 admin access, US2 period switching UI, US3 manager access confirmed)
